titles.title: Optimizing Postpartum Outcomes Act of 2026
Optimizing Postpartum Outcomes Act of 2026

A bill to direct the Secretary of Health and Human Services to issue guidance on coverage under the Medicaid program under title XIX of the Social Security Act of certain pelvic health services furnished during the postpartum period, and for other purposes.

action.text: Read twice and referred to the Committee on Finance.
